features.name: fork with named begin blocks and cross-scope disable
features.description: Code should include a fork block containing multiple named begin:end blocks where disable targets a named block that is not the immediately enclosing block
features.snippet:
fork
    begin: block_a
        #1 disable block_b;
    end
    begin: block_b
        @(posedge clk);
    end
join

features.name: nested fork with disable targeting outer scope blocks
features.description: Code should include a nested fork within a fork where inner disable statements target named blocks in the outer fork scope
features.snippet:
fork
    begin: u_check_1
        #1 disable u_check_2;
        fork
            begin: l_check_1
                #1 disable l_check_2;
            end
            begin: l_check_2
                @(posedge clk);
            end
        join
    end
    begin: u_check_2
        @(posedge clk);
    end
join
